name: Brine Dragon Bile

spell.name: Brine Dragon Bile
spell.trigger: A creature within range takes damage from a slashing or piercing attack, or one that inflicts persistent bleed damage.

text: You spit a glob of caustic saltwater that stings the wounds of the creature. Make a ranged spell attack against the triggering creature's AC. On a hit, salt scours its open wound, dealing 2d6 persistent acid damage.
